options.name: -fix
options.description: assigns a fixed status to the specified bond pad

options.name: -ioInstName
options.description: specifies the name of I/O instance

options.name: -pad
options.description: specifies the name of bond pad

options.name: -pinName
options.description: specifies the name of the pin inside the instance

options.name: -position
options.description: defines the stagger position of the specified bond pad

options.name: -selected
options.description: places selected bond pad on the specified I/O instance
